title: Full SaaS: Project Tracker
description: Build a project management API. Users register/login. Projects have name, description, status (active/archived). Tasks belong to projects with title, description, status (todo/in_progress/done), assignee_id. Auth required. Users can only see projects they own. Full CRUD on both resources.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name, required

create a Projects table:
  name, required
  description
  status
  owner_id, required

create a Tasks table:
  title, required
  description
  status
  project_id, required
  assignee_id

# Registration, login, CRUD for projects and tasks
